scripts.prebuild:e2e: bash scripts/run-variant.sh e2e expo prebuild --platform ios --clean
scripts.build:development:android: bun run validate:eas:profiles && eas build --profile development --platform android
scripts.build:development:ios: bun run validate:eas:profiles && eas build --profile development --platform ios
scripts.build:e2e:android: bun run validate:eas:profiles && eas build --profile e2e --platform android
scripts.build:e2e:ios: bun run validate:eas:profiles && eas build --profile e2e --platform ios
scripts.build:preview:android: bun run validate:eas:profiles && eas build --profile preview --platform android
scripts.build:preview:ios: bun run validate:eas:profiles && eas build --profile preview --platform ios
scripts.build:production:android: bun run validate:eas:profiles && eas build --profile production --platform android
scripts.build:production:ios: bun run validate:eas:profiles && eas build --profile production --platform ios
scripts.build:update:preview: bash scripts/run-variant.sh preview eas update --platform ios --branch preview --clear-cache
scripts.test: bun run test:unit:auth && bunx vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/integration/*.integration.test.ts
scripts.test:unit:auth: vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/auth-state-machine.test.ts tests/auth-provider-utils.test.ts tests/auth-route-guard.test.ts tests/startup-metrics.test.ts tests/auth-validation.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:build:ios: bun run prebuild:e2e && detox build -c ios.sim.e2e
